name: windows-exporter-monitoring
description: Install Prometheus windows_exporter (LocalSystem service, TCP 9182) to match mastw host-level metrics export. Optionally repairs missing Windows performance counters first.
verify: powershell.exe -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -NoProfile -NonInteractive -Command "${log}=Join-Path (Join-Path $env:SystemDrive 'MAST') 'logs\verify\windows-exporter-verify.log'; ${smoke}=Join-Path (Join-Path $env:SystemDrive 'MAST') 'logs\smoke\windows-exporter-smoke.txt'; ${r}=$null; ${err}=''; ${deadline}=(Get-Date).AddSeconds(60); while ($null -eq ${r} -and (Get-Date) -lt ${deadline}) { try { ${r}=Invoke-WebRequest -Uri 'http://127.0.0.1:9182/metrics' -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5 -ErrorAction Stop } catch { ${err}=$_.Exception.Message; Start-Sleep -Seconds 3 } }; if ($null -ne ${r} -and ${r}.StatusCode -eq 200 -and ${r}.Content -match '# HELP') { Set-Content -Path ${log} -Value ('http 200 bytes=' + ${r}.RawContentLength); Set-Content -Path ${smoke} -Value 'windows_exporter_ok' } else { ('verify failed after 60s polling; last exception=' + ${err}) | Out-File -FilePath ${log} -Encoding UTF8; exit 1 }"
